patch.value: Use linked tasks and comments for evidence. Keep operational telemetry scripts and reports under ignored scripts/prod/telemetry only, and do not record secrets or private host credentials in tracked files or pm item text.
Latest CLI quality, SDK, telemetry, search, and calendar remediation

Feature-level tracking for the latest dogfood audit implementation pass across CLI quality, SDK/extension ergonomics, agent-optimized output, semantic search/indexing, calendar workflows, telemetry/Sentry analysis, CI/CD, and sensitive-data hygiene.

Audit findings are actionable and deduplicated; changed files and verification commands are linked; temporary dogfood project validates core workflows; any discovered bugs with safe fixes are remediated and tested.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Parent lineage established under pm-jrjt after duplicate checks found only closed prior audit items.
